name: Riot Dead
description: It died in the line and never took the gear off — helmet, visor, layered plate. Your blows land and skid away; it comes on regardless, patient behind the armor of the last bad day.
signature: still in riot plate and helmet — blows skid off the shell; a bullet finds the gaps
notes: FR-CBT-07 (T46). No state-machine tag — walker-paced; its teeth are in combat (enemy.riot: armor 1). Blunt strikes are blunted to near-nothing, so the right approach is a firearm (which pierces) or a wide berth. Human-only canon: a fallen officer or soldier in the armor they died in.
